name: etechflow/module-back-in-stock-notification
description: Back-in-stock notification for Magento 2. Customer subscribes on out-of-stock product pages, gets emailed when stock returns. Anonymous + customer-linked subscriptions, multi-store aware, one-click unsubscribe, queued/rate-limited delivery. Standalone — works without any other ETechFlow module — and integrates richer when paired with NDE / BED / ISP.

suggest.etechflow/module-next-day-eligibility: Optional. When installed, 'back in stock' uses NDE's eligibility rules engine — so a product that comes back in stock but is still next-day-ineligible (e.g., supplier drop-ship rule) doesn't fire spurious notifications.
suggest.etechflow/module-backorder-eta-display: Optional. When installed, restock-on-backorder notifications include BED's per-product ETA in the email body — 'Back on Jun 12!' instead of just 'Back in stock!'.
suggest.etechflow/module-in-store-pickup: Optional. When installed, customers can subscribe to a specific pickup-store's stock — 'notify me when back at my preferred store'.
